producttype: Lindner Life Stereo 125
description_general: Production stage. Glazing frames (aluminium + glass + sealings) and upright profiles manufactured in the Czech Republic; sheet-steel substructure manufactured in Germany. Manufacturing losses and packaging included .
description_a1: Module A1: provision of all raw materials and energy supply
description_a2: Module A2: transport of raw materials to the production sites in Germany and the Czech Republic .
description_a3: Module A3: manufacturing of the products at both sites; manufacturing losses and packaging included .

producttype: Lindner Life Stereo 125
description_general: 100 km truck transport to the construction site.

producttype: Lindner Life Stereo 125
description_general: Manual (load-free) installation; includes treatment and disposal of packaging.

producttype: Lindner Life Stereo 125
description_general: Manual deconstruction (load-free); no environmental impact .
description_s1: Manual, load-free deconstruction at end of life; no environmental impact .

producttype: Lindner Life Stereo 125
description_general: 50 km truck transport to waste processing .
description_s1: 50 km truck transport to waste processing .

producttype: Lindner Life Stereo 125
description_general: Waste processing: metal recycling for recyclable components; non-recyclable components incinerated .
description_s1: Metal recycling of recyclable wall components ; non-recyclable components (e.g. plastics) incinerated .

producttype: Lindner Life Stereo 125
description_general: Final disposal  landfill .
description_s1: Glass landfilled (worst-case assumption).

producttype: Lindner Life Stereo 125
description_general: Benefits beyond the system boundary: energy recovery from incineration (A5 + C3) and material credit from metal recycling .
description_s1: Credits from energy recovery (packaging in A5, plastics in C3) and material credit from metal recycling.

producttype:
Lindner Logic 100 Timber Partition, 47 and 49 dB Sound Proofing
Variants
description_general: Production stage. Cradle-to-gate with options; manufacturing at Ostrov (CZ) and Arnstorf (DE), base year 2023; packaging included.
description_a1: Module A1: extraction and processing of raw materials  steel (substructure/connection profiles), wood-based materials (wall panel + surface layer), plastics and rubber (sealants), gypsum-based materials (sound insulation + fire protection), and mineral wool .
description_a2: Module A2: transport of raw materials from each supplier to the production plant (Arnstorf or Ostrov); real distances per material .
description_a3: Module A3: manufacturing at both plants incl. electricity and thermal energy; production residues landfilled/incinerated/recycled (50 km to waste facility); packaging produced .

producttype:
Lindner Logic 100 Timber Partition, 47 and 49 dB Sound Proofing
Variants
description_general: Transport from factory gate to construction site: 100 km, incl. packaging.

producttype:
Lindner Logic 100 Timber Partition, 47 and 49 dB Sound Proofing
Variants
description_general: Manual on-site assembly with no relevant environmental impact; includes disposal of packaging (95% pallets reused, 5% incinerated; cardboard and plastic incinerated).

producttype:
Lindner Logic 100 Timber Partition, 47 and 49 dB Sound Proofing
Variants
description_general: Dismantling from the building. Modular design  no destructive demolition, no power required, no significant impact. Declared as 0 .
description_s1: Non-destructive modular dismantling; components separated on site. Declared as 0 .
description_s2: Non-destructive dismantling preserving components for reuse. Declared as 0 .
description_s3: Non-destructive dismantling preserving the wall panel for repurpose. Declared as 0 .

producttype:
Lindner Logic 100 Timber Partition, 47 and 49 dB Sound Proofing
Variants
description_general: Transport of dismantled components to the waste treatment/disposal facility; 50 km assumed (with additional 100 km for reuse/repurpose) .
description_s1: 50 km to waste facility .
description_s2: 50 km to facility plus additional transport assumed for reuse .
description_s3: 50 km to facility plus additional transport assumed for repurpose .

producttype:
Lindner Logic 100 Timber Partition, 47 and 49 dB Sound Proofing
Variants
description_general: Waste processing  . Reused/repurposed components are reported in C3 .
description_s1: Steel recycled; plastics/sealants and wood-based components incinerated with thermal recovery .
description_s2: Steel recycled; minor plastics incinerated; rest of product reused (CRU); biogenic carbon booked here as GWP-Biogen .
description_s3: Steel recycled; plastics incinerated; wall panel repurposed (CRU); gypsum + mineral wool sent to C4 .

producttype:
Lindner Logic 100 Timber Partition, 47 and 49 dB Sound Proofing
Variants
description_general: Final disposal  landfilling of non-reusable materials; minimal contribution .
description_s1: Gypsum-based components (GFP, GKB, GKF, GKFI) and mineral wool landfilled .
description_s2: Negligible landfill (0.066 kg)  most of the product is reused .
description_s3: Gypsum fibre board landfilled; relevant biogenic carbon booked here .

producttype:
Lindner Logic 100 Timber Partition, 47 and 49 dB Sound Proofing
Variants
description_general: Benefits and loads beyond the system boundary; credits vary by scenario, from recycling (steel), energy recovery (wood/plastics) and reuse/repurpose.
description_s1: Credits from steel recycling and energy recovery .
description_s2: Credits amplified by reuse of 32.28 kg (CRU) .
description_s3: Credits from repurpose of 27.13 kg (CRU) .
